import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Button } from 'reactstrap'; const Form = () => { const [state, setState] = useState({ parameter : "", unit: "", standard: "", types: "" }) const {parameter, unit, standard, types} = state; // console.log(state) const handleSubmit = () => { console.log(e) alert(e) } const handleInputChange = (e) => { let { name, value } = e.target; setState({...state, [name]: value}); } return (
{handleSubmit(e)}}>
) } export default Form
